description: Allow the limited edition 25:43 perfume to whisk you away with fresh and citrusy litsea and lemongrass, before falling into the arms of a big hug of tonka and vanilla.
ingredients: Litsea Cubeba Fruit Oil (Litsea Cubeba Oil)
Dipteryx Odorata Seed Extract (Tonka Seed Extract)

images.alt: A black, curvy spray bottle of 25:43 Body Spray with a black trigger nozzle, centered on a black background. The label is black with white text detailing the product name and description, and it features a bright green "LUSH CLUB" sticker.

A black spray bottle of 25:43 Body Spray stands on a reflective surface against a soft blue and white gradient background. It is flanked by a lime half, a vanilla bean, and a stalk of fresh lemongrass.
Six Lush Club fragrances (Body Spray in Snowcake, VIMT-NO, 25:43; Perfume in Big Blue, Candy Rain, Black Pearl) are shown floating diagonally against a vibrant green and yellow background.
